name: Shanghai Greencourt Investment Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Greencourt Investment Group Co., Ltd. provides real estate investment services to high net worth clients and institutional investors in China and internationally. It offers financial advisory, financing services, M&A services, and asset securitization. The company also engages in equity, debt investment, and other businesses. The company was formerly known as Shanghai Dajiang Food Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shanghai Greencourt Investment Group Co., Ltd. in February 2015. Shanghai Greencourt Investment Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1985 and is based in Shanghai, China.
